Based on 14 reviews

Review Wise?

Reviewers describe Wise as a reliable, easy way to send, receive, and manage money across borders, with low fees, reasonable FX rates, and transfers that are often fast or near-instant. Several say setup is simple, the interface is intuitive, and customer support is stronger than many banks or neobanks. Long-time users mention it becoming a core banking tool. The main complaints are operational friction: document checks can be inconsistent, some transfers are unexpectedly reversed without clear notification, and one user wants better budgeting features.

•3 reviews

Banks in the UK rip you off through your eyeballs when paying overseas invoices, so Wise is a great service to bypass them. Fees are low, FX rates are reasonable, it's easy to use and for us at Kirmada, sending money frequently from the UK to the EU, transfers are more or less instant. Highly recommended.

results.content:
#### What's great

easy to use (4)fast transactions (3)USD accounts (2)

Report

 18 views

•1 review

Great product and excellent service. I've experienced smooth online transactions from the start, and the simple UI makes it easy to track transaction status. However, the signup process was a bit tricky and took longer than expected, requiring multiple follow-ups to get my account set up. Best alternative for Pioneer and Wise (If you just deal in USD)

results.title: KOSH Money Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
#### vs Alternatives

I considered several alternatives, including Wise, Payoneer, and Copperx. I chose KOSH Money because it offers a cleaner experience, faster access to financial tools, and features that better fit my workflow. The platform feels modern, easy to navigate, and provides a seamless way to handle payments and card management without unnecessary complexity.

## KOSH Money

## USD account & credit cards for freelancers & creators

5.0•2 reviews•

## USD account & credit cards for freelancers & creators

5.0•2 reviews•

351 followers

Visit website

Online banking

KOSH is a USD account built specifically for freelancers and creators across Asia. Unlike Wise or Payoneer, which often restrict or delay USD receiving in many Asian countries, KOSH lets you receive payments directly from Upwork and global clients, hold USD balances reliably, and spend with a credit card - without needing a US entity. Early users report faster access to their earnings and fewer payment rejections.

# KOSH Money Reviews [...] #### What needs improvement

While my overall experience has been very positive, there are a few areas that could be improved. More detailed transaction analytics would be helpful, along with expanded card management options and additional integrations with other financial platforms. Faster resolution times for certain support requests and more customization features would make the experience even better. Overall, the product is already excellent and has strong potential for continued growth.
